howItWorks.intro: This spotify royalty calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Revenue = Total Streams x Per-Stream Rate
Projected Streams = Sum of monthly streams with compound growth
Average Monthly Income = Projected Revenue / Months
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: How much does Spotify pay per stream?
faq.answer: Spotify pays between $0.003 and $0.005 per stream on average, though the exact rate varies by listener country, subscription type (free vs premium), and total platform streams that month.

faq.question: Why does the royalty share percentage matter?
faq.answer: If you are signed to a label or distributor, they typically take a percentage of your streaming revenue. Independent artists using distributors like DistroKid or TuneCore often keep 80-100% of their royalties.

faq.question: How are Spotify royalties actually calculated?
faq.answer: Spotify uses a pro-rata model where your streams as a proportion of total platform streams determine your share of the monthly royalty pool. The per-stream rate is an average approximation of this calculation.
